prompts.title: Start with something
prompts.subtitle: Tap a suggestion to get going quickly.

items.summarize: Summarize this text into a few bullet points
items.email: Write a polite follow-up email to a customer
items.ideas: Suggest 5 names for a new product
items.explain: Explain what this code snippet does

simulated.empty: Hi! No real AI backend is connected yet. Type a prompt below and the assistant will echo a placeholder response for now.
simulated.reply: (Echo) This is a placeholder assistant response; no real AI is connected yet. Your message: "{{prompt}}"

state.createError: Could not create a new conversation.
state.emptyDescription: Start a new chat to begin.

history.title: Chat History
history.confirmDeleteMessage: This chat will be deleted. You can undo this action.

settings.title: Chat settings
settings.themeDescription: Adapt your display with Light/Dark mode options
settings.showCodeDescription: Always show code when using data analyst
settings.languageDescription: Select a language to display content in your choice.
settings.archiveAllChatsDescription: Store all chats in the archive without deleting them.
settings.deleteChatsDescription: Permanently delete all chats from your inbox.
settings.improveModelDescription: Allow your content to be used to train our models, which makes ChatGPT better for you and everyone who uses it.
settings.sharedLinksDescription: Access the links exchanged in this conversation.
settings.exportDataDescription: Export your account data for external use.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Choose to permanently delete your account and data.
settings.connectApps: Connect apps to access their information in ChatGPT.
settings.googleDriveDescription: Access the links exchanged in this conversation.
settings.mailchimpDescription: Export your account data for external use.
settings.flowbiteDescription: Export your UI data to generate applications.
settings.figmaDescription: Export your designs and generate code automatically.
settings.multiFactorAuthDescription: Require an extra security challenge when logging in. If you are unable to pass this challenge, you will have the option to recover your account via email.
settings.logOutAllDevicesDescription: Log out of all active sessions across all devices. It may take up to 30 minutes for other devices to be logged out.
settings.logOutThisDeviceDescription: Log out from this device to protect your privacy.
